languages.text: {n}Иждриг лишь горько усмехается.{/n} "Потому что мы не идиоты, чтобы гибнуть, и не братья-генералы, чтобы гнать своих людей на убой. Мы переждем. Мы выживем. Как делали это веками".

traits.locale_text: {n}Иждриг лишь горько усмехается.{/n} "Потому что мы не идиоты, чтобы гибнуть, и не братья-генералы, чтобы гнать своих людей на убой. Мы переждем. Мы выживем. Как делали это веками".
traits.speaker: IzhdrigBatoshskiColonel

languages.text: {n}Izdrig only gives a bitter smile.{/n} "Because we aren't fools eager for an early grave, and we aren't the Brother-Generals who drive their men to the slaughter. We endure. We survive. Just as we have for centuries."
languages.original_text: {n}Иждриг лишь горько усмехается.{/n} "Потому что мы не идиоты, чтобы гибнуть, и не братья-генералы, чтобы гнать своих людей на убой. Мы переждем. Мы выживем. Как делали это веками".

traits.locale_text: {n}Izdrig only gives a bitter smirk.{/n} "Because we aren't fools eager for an early grave, and we aren't the Brother-Generals who drive their men to the slaughter. We endure. We survive. Just as we have for centuries."

{n}Izdrig only gives a bitter smile.{/n} "Because we aren't fools eager for an early grave, and we aren't the Brother-Generals who drive their men to the slaughter. We endure. We survive. Just as we have for centuries."

languages.text: {n}Izdrig schenkt dir nur ein bitteres Lächeln.{/n} "Weil wir weder lebensmüde Narren, noch Bruder-Generäle sind, die ihre Männer zur Schlachtbank treiben. Wir harren aus. Wir überleben. Wie wir es seit Jahrhunderten tun."
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig only gives a bitter smile.{/n} "Because we aren't fools eager for an early grave, and we aren't the Brother-Generals who drive their men to the slaughter. We endure. We survive. Just as we have for centuries."

traits.locale_text: {n}Izdrig schenkt dir nur ein bitteres Lächeln.{/n} "Weil wir weder lebensmüde Narren, noch Bruder-Generäle sind, die ihre Männer zur Schlachtbank treiben. Wir harren aus. Wir überleben. Wie wir es seit Jahrhunderten tun."

languages.text: {n}Izdrig se fend d'un sourire empreint d'amertume.{/n} « Parce que nous ne sommes pas suicidaires, et que nous n'avons rien à voir avec les frères-généraux qui envoient leurs troupes à l'abattoir. Nous résistons. Nous survivons. Comme nous le faisons depuis des siècles. »
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig only gives a bitter smile.{/n} "Because we aren't fools eager for an early grave, and we aren't the Brother-Generals who drive their men to the slaughter. We endure. We survive. Just as we have for centuries."

traits.locale_text: {n}Izdrig se fend d'un sourire empreint d'amertume.{/n} « Parce que nous ne sommes pas suicidaires, et que nous n'avons rien à voir avec les frères-généraux qui envoient leurs troupes à l'abattoir. Nous résistons. Nous survivons. Comme nous le faisons depuis des siècles. »

languages.text: {n}Izdrig solo te dirige una sonrisa amarga.{/n} «Porque ni somos tan insensatos como para lanzarnos de cabeza a la tumba ni somos como los hermanos generales, dispuestos a sacrificar a su gente. Resistimos. Sobrevivimos. Llevamos siglos haciéndolo».
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig only gives a bitter smile.{/n} "Because we aren't fools eager for an early grave, and we aren't the Brother-Generals who drive their men to the slaughter. We endure. We survive. Just as we have for centuries."

traits.locale_text: {n}Izdrig solo te dirige una sonrisa amarga.{/n} «Porque ni somos tan insensatos como para lanzarnos de cabeza a la tumba ni somos como los hermanos generales, dispuestos a sacrificar a su gente. Resistimos. Sobrevivimos. Llevamos siglos haciéndolo».

languages.text: {n}İzdrig, yalnızca acı bir şekilde gülümsüyor.{/n} "Çünkü biz erkenden mezara girmek için yanıp tutuşan aptallar değiliz. Adamlarını katliama sürükleyen Rahip Generaller gibi de değiliz. Katlanıyoruz. Hayatta kalıyoruz. Yüzyıllardır olduğu gibi."
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig only gives a bitter smile.{/n} "Because we aren't fools eager for an early grave, and we aren't the Brother-Generals who drive their men to the slaughter. We endure. We survive. Just as we have for centuries."

traits.locale_text: {n}İzdrig, yalnızca acı bir şekilde gülümsüyor.{/n} "Çünkü biz erkenden mezara girmek için yanıp tutuşan aptallar değiliz. Adamlarını katliama sürükleyen Rahip Generaller gibi de değiliz. Katlanıyoruz. Hayatta kalıyoruz. Yüzyıllardır olduğu gibi."

languages.text: {n}伊兹德里格只能苦笑。{/n}“因为我们不是急着找死的蠢货，也不是把士兵往屠宰场里赶的将军兄弟。我们忍耐，所以才能存活，就像过去几百年一样。”
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig only gives a bitter smile.{/n} "Because we aren't fools eager for an early grave, and we aren't the Brother-Generals who drive their men to the slaughter. We endure. We survive. Just as we have for centuries."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊兹德里格只能苦笑。{/n}“因为我们不是急着找死的蠢货，也不是把士兵往屠宰场里赶的将军兄弟。我们忍耐，所以才能存活，就像过去几百年一样。”

languages.text: {n}イズドリックは苦い笑みを浮かべた。{/n}「愚か者で早死にを望む者でも、兵を屠殺に駆り立てる兄弟将軍でもない。我々は耐え、生き延びる。何世紀にも渡ってそうしてきたのだ。」
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig only gives a bitter smile.{/n} "Because we aren't fools eager for an early grave, and we aren't the Brother-Generals who drive their men to the slaughter. We endure. We survive. Just as we have for centuries."

traits.locale_text: {n}イズドリックは苦い笑みを浮かべた。{/n}「愚か者で早死にを望む者でも、兵を屠殺に駆り立てる兄弟将軍でもない。我々は耐え、生き延びる。何世紀にも渡ってそうしてきたのだ。」
